headline: Why Intuit (INTU) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of financial technology platform Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) fell 4.3% in the afternoon session after investor concerns resurfaced about the disruptive potential of artificial intelligence, triggering a broad sell-off across the software sector.

headline: Reassessing Intuit (INTU) Valuation After Stock Pullback And FedNow Real Time Payments Certification
summary: FedNow certification shifts focus to Intuit’s real time payments push Intuit (INTU) has completed the Federal Reserve’s certification and readiness program for the FedNow Service, putting its real time payments capabilities in focus just as investors reassess the stock after recent declines. The move allows Intuit to send instant payment transactions through partner financial institutions. The company is highlighting potential benefits for small businesses that rely on faster access to cash...
